description: Consolidated Bitcoin market data for AI agents: BBO pricing, ML signals, funding skew, briefings.
name: io.github.bxetech/bpe-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your BPE API key. Free tier available for evaluation; Agent tier unlocks the full briefing endpoint with ML signals, funding skew, and sentiment. Request at https://bxetech.com/contact.

environmentVariables.description: Override the BPE backend endpoint. Defaults to https://mcp.bxetech.com. Use https://mcp-qa1.bxetech.com for QA testing.

title: BPE (Bitcoin Pricing Engine)
